name: American Axle & Manufacturing, Inc.
h1: American Axle & Manufacturing's GCC footprint in India
lede: American Axle & Manufacturing runs six capability centers across three Indian cities. Pune, Chennai and Rudrapur, covering engineering & design and manufacturing, built over 22 years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one American Axle & Manufacturing office in India. We map six, across three cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: American Axle & Manufacturing GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: American Axle & Manufacturing runs 6 verified GCC centers across 3 Indian cities (Pune, Chennai, Rudrapur), covering engineering & design and manufacturing. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

leaders.departments: IT, HR, GCC leadership and Procurement

titles.title: Head of India IT (India CIO) and Global Competency Center (GCC)

about.description: American Axle & Manufacturing's India footprint covers Pune, Chennai and Rudrapur, spanning engineering & design and manufacturing. The centers deliver IT, R&D and ER&D and Procurement for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all seven decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many GCC centers does American Axle & Manufacturing operate in India?
faq.a: American Axle & Manufacturing operates 6 active Global Capability Center sites in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does American Axle & Manufacturing have GCC centers in?
faq.a: American Axle & Manufacturing's India GCC footprint spans Pune, Chennai and Rudrapur.

faq.q: What types of GCC centers does American Axle & Manufacturing run in India?
faq.a: American Axle & Manufacturing runs engineering & design and manufacturing centers in India.

faq.q: How many people work at American Axle & Manufacturing's India GCCs?
faq.a: American Axle & Manufacturing's India centers employ in the 1,000 to 5,000 range. The exact aggregate and the headcount at each site are in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads American Axle & Manufacturing's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks 7 leaders at American Axle & Manufacturing's India centers, across IT, HR, GCC leadership and Procurement. Names and contact details open with a free account.

sources: company filings, LinkedIn, NASSCOM and Bamboo Reports' primary research
